category_sources: Official Mozilla repository describes web-ext as a command-line tool to build, run, and test WebExtensions.
source_facts.description says web-ext helps build, run, and test web extensions.
display_name_sources: Official Mozilla repository and documentation use web-ext.
docs_sources: Official Mozilla repository README links to Extension Workshop getting-started and command-reference documentation for web-ext.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Mozilla GitHub repository https://github.com/mozilla/web-ext.
tags_sources: Official Mozilla repository describes building, running, and testing WebExtensions.
Official repository topics include webextension, webextensions, browser-extension, and add-ons.
